---
id: get-album
title: "Get album detail"
description: "Returns the detail page for a specific album including tracklist and metadata."

hide_title: true

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get album detail"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/library/album/{id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns the detail page for a specific album including tracklist and metadata.

  as={"h2"}
